svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" pages="2"> <diagram name="BACEN-Pix-Flows" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-614" dy="-202" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="780" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="BACEN Pix — Payment, Devolução & DICT Flows" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="700" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dict" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="DICT
Diretório de Chaves
GET /entries/{Key} · claims/reivindicação" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="470" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="payer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Pagador PSP
(orchestration-go-pix-out)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="60" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="spi" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="SPI — BACEN
Sistema de Pagamentos Instantâneos
liquidação · reservas" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="240" x="480" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="payee" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Recebedor PSP
(orchestration-go-pix-in)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="920" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cob" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="API Cobrança
POST /cob · /cobv
QR Code · webhook" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="920" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="refund" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Devolução / Refund
(orchestration-go-pix-refund)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="920" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="payments.pix_transactions
end_to_end_id · end_to_end_id_refund · type_transaction" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="480" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;" value="Identifiers
E + 31 = end_to_end_id (E2EID) — original Pix, issued by originating PSP
D + 31 = rtr_id (RtrId) — devolução/refund, issued by refunding PSP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="560" x="60" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_resolve" edge="1" parent="1" source="payer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="dict" value="resolve chave (CPF/CNPJ/email/tel/EVP)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_pacs008a" edge="1" parent="1" source="payer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;flowAnimation=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="spi" value="PACS008 — E2EID (prefixo E)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_pacs008b" edge="1" parent="1" source="spi" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;flowAnimation=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="payee" value="PACS008 (pix-in)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_pacs002b" edge="1" parent="1" source="payee" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.7;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="spi" value="PACS002 — status"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_pacs002a" edge="1" parent="1" source="spi" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.7;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="payer" value="PACS002 (ACSC/RJCT)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_refund1" edge="1" parent="1" source="refund" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;flowAnimation=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.6;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="spi" value="PACS004 / camt.056 — RtrId (prefixo D)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_refund2" edge="1" parent="1" source="spi" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="payer" value="devolução → Pagador"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_qr" edge="1" parent="1" source="cob" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="payer" value="QR Code / Copia e Cola"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_persist" edge="1" parent="1" source="payee" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="db" value="persist E2EID"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_persistr" edge="1" parent="1" source="refund" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.85;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="db" value="end_to_end_id_refund"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> <diagram name="pixkb-Pipeline" id="1"> <mxGraphModel dx="1200" dy="800" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="t2" value="pixkb — Ingest → Index → Query → Eval Pipeline" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="20" width="760" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sources" value="Sources" style="swimlane;startSize=30;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="80" width="260" height="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_iso" value="ISO 20022 spec
pacs.* · camt.*" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="sources"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="40" width="220" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_pdf" value="PDF manual
(BACEN Pix manuals)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="sources"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="90" width="220" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_md" value="Markdown reference
(BACEN ID vocabulary)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="sources"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="140" width="220" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_git" value="Git mirror
(bacen repos)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="sources"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="190" width="220" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_oa" value="OpenAPI
(pix-api · pix-dict-api)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="sources"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="240" width="220" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ingest" value="Ingest
GatherAll → CrossLink" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="360" y="190" width="200" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="runner" value="Epoch Runner
reconcile · git commit
prune embeddings" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="190" width="200" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bundle" value="Canonical Bundle
kb-data/ (git)
OKF markdown — source of truth" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="900" y="90" width="240" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="index" value="Postgres + pgvector
concept · embedding · edge · concept_fact
(derived, rebuildable)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="900" y="290" width="240" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="query" value="Query — Hybrid
FTS (title-weighted, len-norm)
+ Vector (cosine KNN) → RRF" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="900" y="470" width="240" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="judge" value="Eval — Codex judge
cases → search → critique
relevance/precision → fix loop" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="470" width="260" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reindex" value="reindex (rebuild index from bundle)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;align=center;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="900" y="190" width="240" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e1" value="concepts" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;flowAnimation=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="sources" target="ingest"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e2" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;flowAnimation=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="ingest" target="runner"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e3" value="write" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="runner" target="bundle"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e4" value="upsert" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="runner" target="index"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e5" value="reindex" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" id="p_e7" value="runs searches" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="judge" target="query"> <mxGeometry relative="1" source="judge" target="ingest"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

Identifiers
E + 31 = end_to_end_id (E2EID) — original Pix, issued by originating PSP
D + 31 = rtr_id (RtrId) — devolução/refund, issued by refunding PSP
